scripts.vendor: npm run icons && mkdir -p public/assets/vendor/flatpickr && cp node_modules/flatpickr/dist/flatpickr.min.css node_modules/flatpickr/dist/flatpickr.min.js public/assets/vendor/flatpickr/ && mkdir -p public/assets/vendor/tom-select && cp node_modules/tom-select/dist/css/tom-select.css node_modules/tom-select/dist/css/tom-select.min.css node_modules/tom-select/dist/js/tom-select.complete.min.js public/assets/vendor/tom-select/
